title: Autonomous Work
desc: Complete scheduling flexibility. We focus entirely on creative output, giving you full ownership over your timeline and environment.

title: Latest Gear Stipend
desc: Get an annual hardware budget to construct your dream workspace: custom mechanical keyboards, anamorphic lenses, or multi-GPU editing rigs.

title: Uncapped Learning
desc: Free access to all internal bootcamps, plus a yearly allowance for coding courses, video masterclasses, books, and tech conference passes.

title: Health & Creator Labs
desc: Global premium healthcare coverage, wellness subsidies, and direct workspace passes to state-of-the-art recording studios.
